message.content:
@startuml
title Policy Authorization flow between Smart Edge Open and 5G core

skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam note {
    BackgroundColor LightYellow
}

actor "User/Admin" as UserAdmin1 at left
participant CLI #LightBlue200/Black
participant AfMicroservice #Skyblue300/AliceBlue :Af Microservice# 
note right of NEF:Smart Edge Open provided\nCore component with limited functionality
NEF #PaleGreen400/LightCyan
NGCCPFunction #Springgreen600/Springgreen800 : NGC CP Function# 

box "" #lightgrey
group **Policy Authorization - Application Session Context GET**flow
    
        activate UserAdmin1
        
            UserAdmin1 ->>CLI:Get app session context with \nappSessionId
            
                activate CLI
                
                    CLI->>+AfMicroservice:/af/v1/policy-authorization/app-sessions/{appSessionId}\GET
                    
                        activate AfMicroservice
                        
                            AfMicroservice->>+NEF:/npcf-policyauthorization/v1/app-sessions/{appSessionId}\GET
                            
                                activate NEF
                                
                                    NEF-->+NGCCPFunction:200 OK: app-session information\ERROR
                                    
                                        activate NGCCPFunction
                                        
                                            deactivate NGCCPFunction
                                            
                                                return ERROR
                                                
                                                    deactivate NEF
                                                    
                                                        return ERROR
                                                            
                                                            deactivate AfMicroservice
                                                                    
                                                                return ERROR
                                                                   
                                                                        deactivate CLI
                                                                           
                                                                                UserAdmin1 <--CLI:Success: app-session information
                                                                                
                                                                                    deactivate UserAdmin1


end group
@enduml
